title: EPA Lead Service Line Inventory: Public’s Help Needed!
summary: EPA Lead Service Line Inventory: Public’s Help Needed! The Environmental Protection Agency (EPA) is requiring that all public water service providers compile an inventory of the materials used in all water service lines to identify any lead service lines. title: Alaska SBDC Closed July 4 & 5
summary: The Alaska SBDC will be closed on Thursday, July 4th, and Friday, July 5th , to celebrate the Independence Day holiday in alignment with the University of Alaska Anchorage (UAA) observance. title: Ballot proposition to change sales tax exemption procedure fails in Borough Assembly
summary: Petersburg Borough Assembly Chambers. (Photo by KFSK) Petersburg voters will not get a chance to vote away their say in who and what is tax exempt. That’s after a ballot proposition that would have given the reins entirely over to the assembly failed at the July 1 Borough Assembly meeting.
